title: loiseleria indica
intro: Loiseleria indica, also known as Laxmi tulsi, is a type of plant that belongs to the Ocimum genus and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to relieve symptoms of fever, cold, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Loiseleria indica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Loiseleria indica can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its essential oil in aromatherapy and topical applications.
